author: IGN YouTube
text:
Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth: Everything MAJOR Added Since Launch
Final Fantasy VII Rebirth was a giant, fully-featured RPG when it released in February 2024, but that’s not to say there haven’t been major updates along the way.

This video tracks the expansive journey Cloud and the party have taken since first leaving Midgar. From every  major update, the highly anticipated PC release on Steam and Epic Games Store, to the game-changing Patch 1.005 which introduced Streamlined Progression and New Game - Head Start, this comprehensive retrospective gives you all the informatino you need to jump right back into Gaia We’ll also dive into performance leaps like PS5 Pro enhancements, DLSS 4 support, the latest Xbox Series X/S and Nintendo Switch 2 releases, and what’s next for the Final Fantasy 7 remake trilogy.

00:00:00 Intro
00:00:46 What Players Got At Launch
00:01:51 What Were the Issues?
00:02:35 PS5 Pro Enhancements and Early Patch Notes
00:03:11 PC Release
00:03:49 Any DLC or crossovers?
00:04:50 Patch 1.005
00:06:10 Xbox & Nintendo Switch 2 Release
00:06:34 Outro

For more tips, tricks, and secrets across Gaia, check out our full Final Fantasy VII Rebirth Guide on IGN: https://www.ign.com/wikis/final-fantasy-7-rebirth

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stranger Than Heaven Second-Take Preview: Combat Seems Harder Than Hell, and that's a Good Sign
Stranger Than Heaven's flexible fighting system feels like an increase in challenge from the standard Like a Dragon brawling, but that seems like a good indication that RGG Studio isn't content to merely serve up more of the same with its new series prequel. We had another IGN editor, Tristan Ogilvie, sit down with Stranger Than Heaven after Michael Higham put together our first combat hands-on last week. Check out this video for Tristan's thoughts.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Never Look Back - Official Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the announcement trailer for Never Look Back, a psychological, rule-based horror game set on an infinite liminal staircase. Players have to descend the staircase, squeeze a cute rubber
duck, and never look back as the Darkness follows behind. Never Look Back is coming to PC (Steam) in November 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls - Official Captain America Character Guide
Check out the Character Guides, a video series designed to help you master the heroes and villains of Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls. Each guide breaks down normal attacks, unique skills, and core tools so you can sharpen your play and dominate the battle. We begin with Captain America, covering his mid-air attacks, anti-airs, Vibranium Shield counters, Ricochet Volley, and more. Bring justice to every fight!

MARVEL Tokon: Fighting Souls is coming to PS5 and PC on August 6, 2026!

#ign #gaming
